    New Feature 1: structural_abnormality_index | structural_abnormality_index = (Cell_Size_Uniformity + Cell_Shape_Uniformity + Clump_Thickness) / 3
    """

    New Feature 4: bare_nuclei_scaled | bare_nuclei_scaled = (Bare_Nuclei - 1) / (10 - 1)

    New Feature 7: sigmoid_mitotic | sigmoid_mitotic = expit(Mitoses)
    New Feature 8: bare_nuclei_vs_clump_thickness | bare_nuclei_vs_clump_thickness = Bare_Nuclei / Clump_Thickness
    New Feature 9: mitotic_vs_clump_thickness | mitotic_vs_clump_thickness = Mitoses / Clump_Thickness
    New Feature 10: structural_index_1 | structural_index_1 = (0.25 * Cell_Size_Uniformity + 0.25 * Cell_Shape_Uniformity + 0.5 * Clump_Thickness)
    New Feature 11: structural_index_2 | structural_index_2 = (0.5 * Cell_Size_Uniformity + 0.25 * Cell_Shape_Uniformity + 0.25 * Clump_Thickness)
    
    Drop Features: Clump_Thickness, Cell_Size_Uniformity, Cell_Shape_Uniformity (already used in new features)
